title: LEGO Speed Champions McLaren F1 Team MCL38 Race Car Toy - Model Kit w/a Collectible Formula 1 Driver Minifigure - Gift for 10+ Year Old Boys, Girls and Adult Motorsport Fans - 77251
features: LEGO car set for kids and adults – The LEGO Speed Champions McLaren F1 Team MCL38 Race Car toy for 10+ year old boys, girls and motorsport fans
1 minifigure – The building toy includes a driver minifigure in a McLaren outfit and helmet, ready to be placed inside the vehicle's cockpit
Authentic details – A McLaren F1 car toy with 2024 design features like a halo bar, rear wing, sponsor stickers, and wider rear tyres with “Pirelli”
F1 fun for all the family – Race for the checkered flag alongside the whole family with other building toys (sold separately) in the LEGO F1 range
LEGO McLaren display model – After kids have enjoyed playing out racing stories with the F1 car toy, they can display it on a shelf or bedside table
F1 gift idea – Enjoy spending some quality time building with dad with this F1 toy car, which makes a thoughtful Father's Day gift
Build iconic car models – LEGO Speed Champions sets let kids and car lovers create brick-built versions of some of the world’s most famous vehicles
description: From the manufacturer McLaren F1 Team MCL38 Race Car playset F1 fans can build, display and play with this LEGO Speed Champions McLaren F1 Team MCL38 Race Car toy vehicle. Who will take pole position? Kids can enjoy the unique thrills and spills of Formula 1 recreating fast-paced racing action with this detailed F1 toy car. LEGO Speed Champions McLaren F1 Team MCL38 Race Car F1 toy car for play and display Kids can build a McLaren F1 Team MCL38 Race Car. Authentic McLaren F1 Team details Race car includes team-sponsor logos and a rear wing. 1 driver minifigure Place inside the cockpit to role-play F1 races. Enter a digital world of building Builders can zoom in, rotate sets in 3D and track progress using the fun, intuitive LEGO Builder app. F1 fun for all the family Race for the chequered flag alongside the whole family with other building sets (sold separately) in the LEGO F1 range.
